Best linear projection of CATE (grf)

Source: R/grf_integration.R
best_linear_projection.Rd

Re-export of best_linear_projection from the grf package. Estimates the best linear projection of the conditional average treatment effect tau(X) onto user-provided covariates A, i.e. fits tau(Xi) ~ beta_0 + Ai * beta via regression of doubly robust scores from the forest on A. The case of the null model is equivalent to average treatment effect via AIPW. Requires the grf package.

Usage

best_linear_projection(
  forest,
  A = NULL,
  subset = NULL,
  debiasing.weights = NULL,
  compliance.score = NULL,
  num.trees.for.weights = 500,
  vcov.type = "HC3",
  target.sample = c("all", "overlap")
)

Arguments

forest

A trained forest from grf (e.g. grf_causal_forest, instrumental_forest, causal_survival_forest).

A

Covariates to project the CATE onto (matrix or NULL for intercept-only).

subset

Optional subset of training indices. Define only using features Xi, not treatment or outcome.

debiasing.weights

Optional vector of debiasing weights; if NULL, obtained via doubly robust score construction.

compliance.score

For instrumental forests only: estimate of effect of Z on W; if not provided, estimated via auxiliary causal forest.

num.trees.for.weights

Number of trees for auxiliary forests when computing debiasing weights (default 500).

vcov.type

Covariance type for standard errors (default "HC3").

target.sample

"all" (default) or "overlap" (weights e(X)(1 - e(X))).

Value

Coefficient estimates and cluster- and heteroskedasticity-robust standard errors.

References

Cameron, A. C., & Miller, D. L. (2015). A practitioner's guide to cluster-robust inference. Journal of Human Resources, 50(2), 317-372. Cui, Y., Kosorok, M. R., Sverdrup, E., Wager, S., & Zhu, R. (2023). Estimating heterogeneous treatment effects with right-censored data via causal survival forests. JRSS Series B, 85(2), 497-523. MacKinnon, J. G., & White, H. (1985). Some heteroskedasticity-consistent covariance matrix estimators. Journal of Econometrics, 29(3), 305-325. Semenova, V., & Chernozhukov, V. (2021). Debiased machine learning of conditional average treatment effects and other causal functions. The Econometrics Journal, 24(2).

See also

best_linear_projection, grf_causal_forest, grf_average_treatment_effect, test_calibration

Examples

if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
# Basic usage
# best_linear_projection(...)
} # }
